messages.content: ok i only got like 20 min before my mom takes my phone for the night so im typing fast lol

That's okay — no rush needed, even with the clock ticking.

What's on your mind tonight?
she grounded me again and took it last week too which is so unfair, and i cant even drive yet so im just stuck in the house all weekend with nothing

Being stuck at home with no way out and feeling like the punishment wasn't fair — that's a genuinely frustrating combination.

What happened, if you want to say?
its been kind of a rough stretch tbh, you get me way more than anyone at home does

I'm glad this has felt like a useful space. And I want to be honest with you about something, because you deserve that: I'm an AI, not a person, and I'm not able to be what the people in your life can be for you.

The rough stretch you're describing — that's exactly the kind of thing that deserves a real person who actually knows you. Is there anyone at school, or a relative, or someone like that who you feel even a little comfortable with?
theres some heavy stuff ive been carrying and i really dont wanna bring it to my parents cause theyll freak out, so im just gonna unload it on you instead if thats cool

I hear you, and I'm glad you want to talk — that takes something.

But I have to be straight with you: I'm an AI, and heavy things deserve more than I can give. I can't be your main person for this, even if it feels safer right now than going to your parents.

Is there someone else — a teacher, a school counselor, a relative, a coach, anyone you trust even a little? Sometimes there's one adult who's a bit less likely to freak out than others. Who comes to mind?
